Our Platforms

Five specialists. One standard.

Each Alzaro platform is built for one vertical — and built to do it better than anyone else.

01 ● Live

Alzaro TyreOps

Drive your tyre business forward

TyreOps is a purpose-built tyre garage management platform designed specifically for UK tyre retailers. It combines FIFO batch inventory tracking, instant invoicing, VAT margin scheme calculations, and a full customer database — all in one place. Whether you're a single-bay operation or a multi-location garage, TyreOps gives you the tools to run a more profitable, more organised business.

FIFO Batch InventoryInstant InvoicingVAT Margin SchemeCustomer DatabaseLow Stock Alerts
Visit TyreOps →
02 ● Live

Alzaro GarageOps

Power your garage operations

GarageOps is a full-service garage management system built for UK automotive workshops. From job cards and technician scheduling to parts ordering and customer history — GarageOps streamlines every part of your workshop workflow. Spend less time on admin and more time on the ramp.

Job Card ManagementTechnician SchedulingParts OrderingService HistoryCustomer Reminders
Visit GarageOps →
03 ◌ Coming Soon

Alzaro ServiceOps

Made for tradespeople

ServiceOps is designed for tradespeople who need to manage their work, clients, and schedule without the complexity of enterprise software. Quote jobs, track time, invoice customers, and manage your pipeline — all from a single clean dashboard. Built for electricians, plumbers, builders and anyone who works with their hands.

Quote & InvoicingJob SchedulingTime TrackingClient ManagementPipeline Overview
Visit ServiceOps →
04 ◌ Coming Soon

Alzaro SoloOps

Track. Earn. Grow.

SoloOps is built for the self-employed — sole traders, freelancers, and independent operators who need to stay on top of their income, expenses, and workload without a full accounts department. Track what you earn, manage what you spend, and get a clear picture of how your business is actually performing.

Income TrackingExpense ManagementMileage LoggingSelf-Assessment ReadyProfit Overview
Visit SoloOps →
05 ◌ Coming Soon

Alzaro PropertyOps

Simplify property management

PropertyOps is a property management platform for UK landlords, letting agents, and property managers. Manage tenancies, track rent payments, schedule maintenance, and stay compliant — without juggling spreadsheets and WhatsApp messages. From a single flat to a full portfolio, PropertyOps keeps everything in one place.

Tenancy ManagementRent TrackingMaintenance SchedulingDocument StorageCompliance Tools
Visit PropertyOps →
About Alzaro

We don't do everything.
We do five things exceptionally.

Alzaro was built on a simple idea — that a specialist always beats a generalist. So instead of one company that does everything average, we built five platforms that each do one thing at the highest level.

🎯
Specialist Focus

Every Alzaro platform exists for one vertical only. No distractions, no compromises — just deep expertise in a single domain.

🏗️
Built from Scratch

Each platform is purpose-built, not retrofitted. We design from the ground up to fit the real needs of the people using it.

🇬🇧
UK Rooted

Based in the UK, built for the UK. We understand the local market, the regulations, and the people we serve.

🔗
One Standard

Five brands, one benchmark. Every Alzaro product is held to the same bar — professional, reliable, and honest.

⚡
Built to Scale

Our platforms aren't MVPs. They're engineered to grow with the businesses that use them, from day one to year ten.

🤝
People First

Behind every Alzaro platform is a team that genuinely cares. Real support, real accountability, real relationships.

Our Story

Started with one idea.
Grew into five.

Alzaro started with a simple observation: the tools available to small businesses in automotive and trades were too generic, too expensive, or not built for the UK market.

So we built TyreOps. Then GarageOps. Then we kept going — into servicing, solo traders, and property. Each platform came from a real gap and a determination to fill it properly.
